BATMAN RETURNS MD

2-player Genesis/Mega Drive launcher with mapped keyboard controls and quiz timer built in.

READY?

This version clears old EmulatorJS control saves before starting, then applies the new 2-player keyboard map.

Player 1: Arrows | Attack I | Jump O | Gadget U | Block P. Player 2: W A S D | Attack B | Jump V | Gadget N | Block C.

Jump: V
